steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Calculations for PETRORECÔNCAVO S.A. as of 2024-03-31
from decimal import Decimal
# Inputs from data
shares_issued = 293338126
shares_treasury = 225996
shares_outstanding = shares_issued - shares_treasury
price = 20.3

# Balance sheet / income values (latest 2024-03-31)
ativo_total = 6885124000.0
ativo_circulante = 1209553000.0
caixa = 302149000.0
aplicacoes_fin = 384688000.0
contas_receber = 349761000.0
estoques = 9436000.0
tributos_rec = 144792000.0
outros_act_circ = 18727000.0
ativo_nao_circ = 5675571000.0
imobilizado = 5451380000.0
intangivel = 18359000.0

passivo_circulante = 1154580000.0
fornecedores = 215748000.0
emprestimos_fin_cp = 149689000.0
outras_obrig = 644027000.0

passivo_nc = 1079113000.0
emprestimos_fin_lp = 723130000.0

patrimonio_liq = 4651431000.0

# Income statement quarterly (Q1 2024)
rev_q1_2024 = 744735000.0
cogs_q1_2024 = -475848000.0
res_bruto_q1_2024 = 268887000.0
ebit_q1_2024 = 199490000.0
res_fin_q1_2024 = -70978000.0
res_antes_trib_q1_2024 = 128512000.0
imp_q1_2024 = -18479000.0
net_q1_2024 = 110033000.0

a_deprec_q1_2024 = -153862000.0  # negative in data - retain magnitude

# Income statement quarterly Q1 2023
rev_q1_2023 = 719212000.0
cogs_q1_2023 = -442263000.0
res_bruto_q1_2023 = 276949000.0
ebit_q1_2023 = 230913000.0
res_fin_q1_2023 = 6301000.0
res_antes_trib_q1_2023 = 237214000.0
imp_q1_2023 = -37701000.0
net_q1_2023 = 199513000.0

a_deprec_q1_2023 = -103923000.0

# Annual (2023) values from previous year (for LTM computation)
rev_2023 = 2814361000.0
ebit_2023 = 679817000.0
net_2023 = 708938000.0
deprec_2023 = 598327000.0
res_bruto_2023 = 897700000.0

# Compute LTM (last twelve months ending 2024-03-31)
rev_ltm = rev_2023 + rev_q1_2024 - rev_q1_2023
ebit_ltm = ebit_2023 + ebit_q1_2024 - ebit_q1_2023
net_ltm = net_2023 + net_q1_2024 - net_q1_2023
res_bruto_ltm = res_bruto_2023 + res_bruto_q1_2024 - res_bruto_q1_2023

# Depreciation LTM: take magnitude
deprec_ltm = deprec_2023 + (-a_deprec_q1_2024) - (-a_deprec_q1_2023)
# Note deprec in data negative; convert to positive magnitudes

# Debt calculations
# Dív. Bruta = emprestimos CP + emprestimos LP + debentures (not present)
div_bruta = emprestimos_fin_cp + emprestimos_fin_lp
# Dívida Líquida = dívida bruta - disponibilidades (caixa)
div_liquida = div_bruta - caixa

# Capitalization
market_cap = price * shares_outstanding
net_debt = div_liquida
enterprise_value = market_cap + net_debt

# EBITDA LTM
ebitda_ltm = ebit_ltm + deprec_ltm

# Per share metrics
vpa = patrimonio_liq / shares_outstanding
lpa = net_ltm / shares_outstanding
ativos_per_share = ativo_total / shares_outstanding
cap_giro = ativo_circulante - passivo_circulante
ativ_circ_liq = ativo_circulante - caixa  # assumed

# Ratios per definitions
pl = price / (lpa if lpa!=0 else float('nan'))
ppvp = price / vpa
p_ebit = price / (ebit_ltm / shares_outstanding if ebit_ltm!=0 else float('nan'))
psr = price / (rev_ltm / shares_outstanding if rev_ltm!=0 else float('nan'))
p_ativos = price / (ativos_per_share if ativos_per_share!=0 else float('nan'))
p_cap_giro = price / (cap_giro / shares_outstanding if cap_giro!=0 else float('nan'))
p_ativ_circ_liq = price / (ativ_circ_liq / shares_outstanding if ativ_circ_liq!=0 else float('nan'))

ev_ebitda = enterprise_value / ebitda_ltm if ebitda_ltm!=0 else float('nan')
ev_ebit = enterprise_value / ebit_ltm if ebit_ltm!=0 else float('nan')

# Margins (percent)
marg_bruta = (res_bruto_ltm / rev_ltm) * 100 if rev_ltm!=0 else float('nan')
marg_ebit = (ebit_ltm / rev_ltm) * 100 if rev_ltm!=0 else float('nan')
marg_liq = (net_ltm / rev_ltm) * 100 if rev_ltm!=0 else float('nan')

# EBIT/Ativo percent
ebit_over_ativo = (ebit_ltm / ativo_total) * 100 if ativo_total!=0 else float('nan')

# ROIC = EBIT / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa)
roic_denom = ativo_total - fornecedores - caixa
roic = (ebit_ltm / roic_denom) * 100 if roic_denom!=0 else float('nan')

# ROE
roe = (net_ltm / patrimonio_liq) * 100 if patrimonio_liq!=0 else float('nan')

# Liquidez Corr: ativo circulante / passivo circulante
liquidez_corr = ativo_circulante / passivo_circulante if passivo_circulante!=0 else float('nan')

# Div Br / Patrim
divbr_patrim = div_bruta / patrimonio_liq if patrimonio_liq!=0 else float('nan')

# Giro Ativos
giro_ativos = rev_ltm / ativo_total if ativo_total!=0 else float('nan')

# Prepare results dictionary
results = {
    'shares_outstanding': shares_outstanding,
    'market_cap': market_cap,
    'ativo_total': ativo_total,
    'disponibilidades': caixa,
    'ativo_circulante': ativo_circulante,
    'div_bruta': div_bruta,
    'div_liquida': div_liquida,
    'patrimonio_liq': patrimonio_liq,
    'receita_ltm': rev_ltm,
    'ebit_ltm': ebit_ltm,
    'net_ltm': net_ltm,
    'receita_3m': rev_q1_2024,
    'ebit_3m': ebit_q1_2024,
    'net_3m': net_q1_2024,
    'pl': pl,
    'pvp': ppvp,
    'p_ebit': p_ebit,
    'psr': psr,
    'p_ativos': p_ativos,
    'p_cap_giro': p_cap_giro,
    'p_ativ_circ_liq': p_ativ_circ_liq,
    'ev_ebitda': ev_ebitda,
    'ev_ebit': ev_ebit,
    'lpa': lpa,
    'vpa': vpa,
    'marg_bruta_pct': marg_bruta,
    'marg_ebit_pct': marg_ebit,
    'marg_liq_pct': marg_liq,
    'ebit_over_ativo_pct': ebit_over_ativo,
    'roic_pct': roic,
    'roe_pct': roe,
    'liquidez_corr': liquidez_corr,
    'divbr_patrim': divbr_patrim,
    'giro_ativos': giro_ativos
}

# Print results
import json
print(json.dumps(results, indent=2))
"} }
steps.name: code_interpreter
